name: Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile S.A.
content: Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile S.A. (SQM) is a global mining and chemical company based in Chile, recognized as a world leader in the production of lithium, iodine, and specialty plant nutrients. The company operates in northern Chile's Atacama Desert, where it extracts high-grade caliche and brine deposits. SQM plays a critical role in the global energy transition by providing high-quality lithium chemicals essential for electric vehicle batteries and energy storage systems. Additionally, it is a major producer of potassium nitrate and solar salts, serving diverse industries including agriculture, healthcare, and renewable energy.
